# zitadel_instance_restrictions (Resource)

Resource representing the instance restrictions.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "zitadel_instance_restrictions" "default" {
  disallow_public_org_registration = true
  allowed_languages                = ["en", "de"]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `allowed_languages` (Set of String) Allowed languages (BCP 47 language tags) for the instance
- `disallow_public_org_registration` (Boolean) Disallow public organization registration for the instance

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

## Import

```bash
terraform import zitadel_instance_restrictions.default ""
```
